topic: Billing, Upgrade, and Practitioner Access Basics
learningGoal: Practitioners understand what changes when they upgrade and where to look for billing-related actions.
keyPoints: Use the billing area to confirm your current plan, renewal state, and access level
Upgrade when you need practitioner workflows, client-facing delivery, or higher-volume usage
Check feature access after plan changes so you know what is available immediately versus what may require setup
Escalate billing issues through the proper support path instead of guessing or retrying charges repeatedly
forbiddenClaims: chargebacks are the normal support path
toneNotes: Direct and reassuring. Treat billing as operational clarity, not sales pressure.
